description: Use this API to return an array of integer values for subsystem owners. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, iarray = aownerint(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the owner subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem owners to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the owner quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: iarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all owners in the working case.
valid owner subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only subsystem owners with at least one ac bus assigned to them.
for subsystem owners with any equipment (ac buses, loads, machines, ac branches, FACTS devices, VSC dc lines and/or dc buses) assigned to them.

string.description: Number of ac buses assigned to the owner.
Number of loads assigned to the owner.
Number of machine ownership specifications for the owner.
Number of induction machines assigned to the owner.
Number of branch ownership specifications for the owner.
Number of FACTS devices assigned to the owner.
Number of VSC dc line ownership specifications for the owner.
Number of dc buses assigned to the owner.

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of IARRAY, is not large enough.
